case_title: GOYETTE, LEE F. vs. MULHOLLAND, WALTER SANDY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOYETTE, LEE F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULHOLLAND, WALTER SANDY ALMOND, SUSYN J. SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MULHOLLAND, WALTER SANDY ALMOND, SUSYN J.
